name: aftercare_public_form
_note: Stub sincronizado 2026-04-26 (bloque 14). Para version completa: mcp__n8n__n8n_get_workflow id=WHtdrr3tJpei3IM8 mode=full
_purpose: Endpoint publico HTML para que clientes reporten incidencias postventa (LOE). GET /webhook/aftercare-public-form?token=<token> -> valida client_access_tokens (purpose='aftercare'), si valido devuelve form HTML responsive con campos descripcion + foto + categoria; si no valido, pagina de error neutra. El form submitea via POST a aftercare_public_submit (workflow distinto x5j2VKbz9tfQyqzl).
_security: Token validado en BD (table client_access_tokens, purpose='aftercare', not revoked, not expired). Page incluye HSTS + X-Frame DENY + nosniff + referrer-policy + permissions-policy headers (security_headers).
_chain: GET aftercare_public_form -> render form -> submit via POST aftercare_public_submit -> creates aftercare_issue + Vision LLM classifies
